message:
test(config): add 17 unit tests for TLS and WSL config types (wa-5jxyo)

Expand test coverage for TlsDomainServer, TlsDomainClient, WslDomain,
WslDistro, and parse_wsl_distro_list with default, clone, debug, and
parsing edge case tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
